title: EQ - Dialog for "i" button is present and can be closed
scenario: EQ info icon in Device Settings displays explanatory dialog that can be dismissed by tapping anywhere on screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, locate the Audio Settings section and tap on it.
5. Verify that an info ("i") icon is present next to the EQ headline.
8. Verify the dialog text explains that EQ enhances clarity by adjusting frequency for preferred sound signature and that changes affect music streaming, not telephony.
9. Tap on the dialog itself to dismiss it.
10. Alternatively, tap anywhere on the screen outside the dialog to dismiss it.
expected: An info ("i") icon is present next to the EQ headline. Tapping it shows a dialog with the correct explanation. The dialog can be dismissed by tapping on it or anywhere on the screen.
